title: Bug Fix
summary: Turn a bug report into root-cause evidence, a patch plan, and regression checks.
task_template: Fix or investigate this bug: {task}. Focus on root cause, smallest safe patch, and regression tests in scope: {scope}.
context: Expected outcome: accepted root-cause evidence, risky assumptions, files to inspect, recommended patch, and verification commands.
outcome: A root-cause-focused fix plan with test coverage guidance.
next_steps: Answer each specialist packet in order.
Implement only the accepted main-agent fix after synthesis.
Run the recommended regression command before claiming completion.
